## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (lint, format, typecheck, tests)
- [ ] Added/updated a test for any new behaviour path or error condition
- [ ] Honours the invariants in `CLAUDE.md` (cheap hot path, atomic writes, never crash the render, etc.)
- [ ] If this touches the spec or a prior decision, I updated `specs/` and noted it below
